headline: Jim Cramer on Caterpillar: “It’s Got a Ton of Business From the Data Center Build-Out”
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer highlighted how the company is benefiting from the data center build-out, as he commented: I remember the days when our economy ran only on the consumer… However, with the arrival of data centers, no surprise to […]

headline: BofA Highlights Energy Growth Driving Caterpillar (CAT) Upside
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) ranks among the stocks to invest in before they split next. Notably, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) has a history of rewarding shareholders through stock splits, having split its stock several times throughout the decades, the most recent in 2005. On April 24, BofA Securities boosted Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT)’s price target to $930 from […]
